jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropEquity - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
